stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The fuel imbalance electronic checklist lists 'FUEL X-FEED ON' as one of the actions. What actions should the crew take?

options.a: The crew should consider the possibilty of a fuel leak which would result in the fuel from the right hand wing being lost overboard if the fuel crossfeed was selected to ON.
options.b: If there has been no master warning for a fuel leak it is safe to select the fuel crossfeed to ON.
options.c: This item can be skipped and the fuel pumps can then be switched off as commanded by the checklist.
options.d: The fuel crossfeed should be selected to ON as the ECAM computer will have checked for a fuel leak.
